title: senecio hallii
intro: Senecio hallii, also known as Hall's ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Senecio hallii include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and support the immune system. Senecio hallii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
